modelResponses.text:
The tool has been discovered. Now I can use it to audit the demo website. The tool has a default URL of "https://playwright.dev" but I should probably ask the user if they have a specific demo site they want audited, or I can proceed with the default. Let me proceed with the default demo site since the user didn't specify a particular URL.
 Now I can audit the demo website. Let me run the audit on the default demo site.

The audit has been completed. Let me format the findings into a concise report as requested by the user. ## UI/UX Audit Report: Playwright.dev ### Summary The site is functional but requires improvements in visual hierarchy and accessibility-focused interaction states. --- ### Findings | Severity | Issue | Location | Repro Steps | Suggested Fix | |----------|-------|----------|-------------|---------------| | **Medium** | Low visual hierarchy on hero section | `/` (Homepage hero) | 1. Navigate to homepage
2. Observe primary heading vs supporting text | Increase heading size/weight and reduce secondary text prominence for clearer hierarchy | | **Low** | No explicit keyboard focus styling | Global interactive elements | 1. Tab through interactive elements
2. Note inconsistent focus visibility | Define a consistent, high-contrast focus ring across all interactive components | --- ### Priority Actions 1. **Medium Priority**: Restructure hero section typography to establish clear visual hierarchy 2. **Low Priority**: Implement custom focus styles for better keyboard navigation accessibility
